message:
chore: add .ubsignore for UBS scanner

Mirrors patterns from .gitignore to exclude build artifacts,
IDE configs, and test directories from bug scanning.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+# Build artifacts
+target/
+target*/
+
+# IDE
+.idea/
+.vscode/
+*.swp
+*.swo
+
+# Legacy reference code
+legacy_beads/
+
+# Local configs
+.bv/
+.beads/
+
+# Test artifacts
+temp_test*/
+coverage/
+
+# OS files
+.DS_Store
+Thumbs.db
+
+# Session artifacts
+SESSION_STATUS.md
+a.out
+rustc-ice-*.txt
